items.text: Consumer component shall execute according to scheduling and timing constraints defined for Consumer.impl
items.fragment: Consumer component shall execute according to scheduling and timing constraints defined for Consumer.impl
items.requirement_fragment: Consumer component shall execute according to scheduling and timing constraints defined for Consumer.impl

items.text: Consumer component shall use Periodic dispatch protocol
items.fragment: Consumer component shall use Periodic dispatch protocol
items.requirement_fragment: Consumer component shall use Periodic dispatch protocol

items.text: Consumer component shall execute with a period of 1000 ms
items.fragment: Consumer component shall execute with a period of 1000 ms
items.requirement_fragment: Consumer component shall execute with a period of 1000 ms

items.text: Consumer component shall meet a deadline of 1000 ms
items.fragment: Consumer component shall meet a deadline of 1000 ms
items.requirement_fragment: Consumer component shall meet a deadline of 1000 ms

items.text: Consumer component shall complete compute execution within 0 ms .. 3 ms
items.fragment: Consumer component shall complete compute execution within 0 ms .. 3 ms
items.requirement_fragment: Consumer component shall complete compute execution within 0 ms .. 3 ms

items.text: Consumer component shall run at priority 101
items.fragment: Consumer component shall run at priority 101
items.requirement_fragment: Consumer component shall run at priority 101
